parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ tool: 'jt_update_account', arguments: { id: $json.jt_account_id, customFieldValues: [{ customFieldId: '22PU427xzLaS', value: $json.jt_source_value }] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ tool: 'jt_create_contact', arguments: { accountId: $json.jt_account_id, firstName: $json.first_name, lastName: $json.last_name, phoneNumber: $json.contact_phone, email: $json.contact_email } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ tool: 'jt_create_job', arguments: { accountId: $json.jt_account_id, name: $json.jt_job_name, description: $json.job_description, organizationId: '22Nm3uFevXMb' } }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO calculator_leads (
  report_id, calculator, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, contact_notes,
  project_state, estimate_low, estimate_high, preferred_date, preferred_time,
  attribution, landing_page, referrer, source_page,
  jt_account_id, jt_contact_id, jt_job_id
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.report_id }}',
  '{{ $json.calculator }}',
  '{{ $json.contact_name }}',
  '{{ $json.contact_phone }}',
  '{{ $json.contact_email }}',
  '{{ $json.contact_notes }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.project_state) }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.estimate_low }},
  {{ $json.estimate_high }},
  {{ $json.preferred_date ? "'" + $json.preferred_date + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.preferred_time ? "'" + $json.preferred_time + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.attribution ? "'" + JSON.stringify($json.attribution) + "'::jsonb" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.landing_page }}',
  '{{ $json.referrer }}',
  '{{ $json.source_page }}',
  '{{ $json.jt_account_id }}',
  '{{ $json.jt_contact_id }}',
  '{{ $json.jt_job_id }}'
) RETURNING id;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '📋 *New Calculator Lead*

*Name:* ' + $json.contact_name + '
*Phone:* ' + $json.contact_phone + '
*Email:* ' + $json.contact_email + '
*Calculator:* ' + $json.calc_label + '
*Estimate:* $' + ($json.estimate_low || 0).toLocaleString() + ' – $' + ($json.estimate_high || 0).toLocaleString() + '

' + ($json.preferred_date ? '📅 *Preferred call:* ' + $json.preferred_date + ', ' + ($json.preferred_time || 'any time') + '
' : '') + '
🔗 Report: ' + $json.report_url }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE calculator_leads SET email_sent = true, email_sent_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = '{{ $('Extract & Validate').first().json.report_id }}';
